== Notes for [[Item:Q2870|Q2870]] ==

Ortega y Pérez Gallardo, Ricardo. '''''Historia genealógica de las familias más antiguas de México, Volume 1''''' [A. Carranza y comp, 1908 - Mexico] ... https://books.google.com/books?id=JNExAQAAMAAJ&pg=PA87&lpg=PA87&dq=Lucas+de+Lara+y+Cervantes&source=bl&ots=go9H52aRll&sig=yueDth-D-rj3DfVAWXrt-unihsg&hl=en&sa=X&ved=0ahUKEwiV-fjS8MvWAhUU2mMKHd4ZD6EQ6AEIWTAM#v=onepage&q=Lucas%20de%20Lara%20y%20Cervantes&f=false ... Read pages online.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9AFE6C1EFBBFA9822EF79916C78D0
geni:6000000016974655579


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
